generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor providing point cloud data for obstacle detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARRawData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Depth camera capturing visual data for object recognition"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraRawData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring vehicle speed for state monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring steering angle for vehicle control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance LiDARRawData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraRawData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ClusteredPointClouds : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed LiDAR point clouds after DBSCAN clustering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawData
]

instance ObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracked objects using Kalman filter on clustered point clouds"
]

instance ACCControlData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data for adaptive cruise control logic based on ISO 15622"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for clustering LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking from clustered point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant adaptive cruise control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for edge computing and AI acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataMonitoringService, ACCComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-process communication in distributed system"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataMonitoringService, ACCComputationOffloadingService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and data processing tasks"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataMonitoringService, ObjectTrackVisualizationService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance components like point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataMonitoringService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for modeling and simulation of point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationOffloadingService
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for persistent data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataMonitoringService
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for DBSCAN-based point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataMonitoringService
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for Kalman filter-based object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackVisualizationService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RealTimeDataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data monitoring including viewing, saving, and generating reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight, ObjectTrackInsight, ReportGenerationInsight
]

instance ACCComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system computation to external Digital Twin Entity"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCStatusInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management capabilities including enable/disable ACC, set speed, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks and projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance VehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle speed and steering angle monitoring for system performance"
]

instance ObjectTrackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Object track data for obstacle detection and path planning"
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated reports for system performance analysis and troubleshooting"
]

instance ACCStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current status and performance of adaptive cruise control system"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks and projected driving path"
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable adaptive cruise control functionality"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable adaptive cruise control functionality"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for adaptive cruise control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking in case of imminent collision"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor voltage command generation for vehicle propulsion"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering control for vehicle direction adjustment"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical component of the Digital Twin system"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServo
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital component of the Digital Twin system"
    base:contains DataCollectionFE, ACCControllingFE
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User interface and interaction component"
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Functional Entity responsible for data collection from physical sensors"
]

instance ACCControllingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Functional Entity for adaptive cruise control logic implementation"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC-computed desired speed and emergency braking commands from the Digital Twin Entity to the Physical Twin Entity, converted to motor voltage commands by the Actuation FE for vehicle speed control."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms, as specified by 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication requirements."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated entities: Physical Twin Entity (ROS2 nodes for sensor processing/actuation), Digital Twin Entity (ACC control, data collection), User Entity (visualization/control), with Data Translation FE handling ROS2 intra-entity and Wi-Fi inter-entity communication."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase; used for real-time monitoring, computation offloading, and remote management of the ACC system during vehicle operation, with compliance validation during development."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC implementation follows ISO 15622 performance class I specifications, but no explicit verification/validation mechanisms or uncertainty analysis are documented."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication with ≤100 ms latency and 100 ms clock sync accuracy."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle-mounted Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity and Data Storage on external server/cloud; User Entity on client devices."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT structure; ACC system implemented per ISO 15622 standards."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical nature acknowledged, but no specific security protocols or safety mechanisms detailed in the document."
]
